en.value:
A) Promotion on Safe Migration & Prevention of Human Trafficking in Makwanpur District

1) Men, women and youth of Human trafficking and unsafe migration prone areas have access to knowledge skill and tools to combat human trafficking and safe migration


	Formation and strengthening of CDC-SM(10 CDC-SM)
	Supporting and strengthening CAHTC on SM(5 CAHTC)
	Extension of help desk to male migrants(one desk)
	Development of IEC materials( Poster, handbook, wall painting, hoarding board, diary, t-shirts, bags)
	Street drama- 10 events
	Production and broadcasting radio program  by local radio/ FM for safe migration
	Debate competition on Safe migration in school level students on various national and international marking days
	Journalist field visit (quarterly basis)
	One day orientation to media person (one event)
	Orientation to school teachers and students
	Various day celebration(16 days campaign against women violence, international women day, international labor day, national anti human trafficking day, international migrant day, HIV AIDs day)
	Door to Door visit of targeted communities(12 events)
	TOT for peer facilitator of CDC-SM(15)
	Coordination and consultative meeting with local government and relevant stakholders( 4 times)
	Upadating woscc website integrating HT and SM issues
	Base line survey and end line survey


2) Potential vulnerable  migrants,  victims, survivors of human trafficking and unsafe migration have increased access to income generating tools , skill, and knowledge


	Training on  sustainable seasonal and off seasonal vegetable farming in coordination with PAMP ( 4 events 120 participants) (PAMP: Prime Ministerial Agricultural Modernazation Project)
	Agriculture input supports ( Seed, fertilizers, plastic tunnel, solar irrigation pump, plastic mulches) ( 30 beneficiaries)
	Training on  livestock farming in coordination with rural municipality livestock office (4 events 120 participants)
	Training on poultry farming and  local Poultry breeds support to targeted beneficiaries (200 poultry breed to 20 beneficiaries) - Insurance of poultry breed
	Training and input support in bee farming and formation of production group (2 events , 60 participants, 4 groups)- including agriculture insurance where possible of bee hives
	Entrepreneur development program for targeted beneficiaries (75 beneficiaries)
	Training and input support in off farm income generating activities-TVET (10 beneficiaries )
	Coordination and Networking  meeting with concerned traders and Agriculture cooperatives (one events) like DPAC, MPAC,
	One day orientation on market information and networking ( 5 events)
	Psycho-social counseling to returnees and survivors (150 beneficiaries)


 

 

B) Youth For Social Change (Mobilizing youth groups for promoting safe migration and prevent human trafficking)

1) Target beneficiaries started to adopt informed  migration and enjoying migrant rights though better services from stakeholders.


	IEC material  developing ,reprinting & distribution (Training manuals, booklets, handbook, self help book, reference materials)
	Development and broadcasting of radio programs
	Counselling services migrant/potential women migrant workers through YEG's Support Desk in municipality.
	Interaction and coordination meeting with Local government, province government and stakeholders in district level, political party representatives and other stakeholders.
	Awareness raising campaign on SM & HT by Youth Empowerment Groups
	Press meet (interaction, and issues exploring), journalist visits
	Forum theatre play in community level


2) Youth Empowerment Groups are capacitated to   work actively with different local stakeholders and local government to promote safe migration and against human trafficking.


	Formation of 16 YEGs  in ward level
	 Training to YEGs on Safe migration, human trafficking, leadership, coordination and  Teambuilding/team mobilization.   
	Training to Counselors on Non violent Communication and counselling 
	 Technical, financial & Motivational Support to the YEGs and YEG Network
	Establishment of Safe Migration Support Desk at municipality, DAO and HURF
	Bi-Monthly meeting of YEGs
	Quarterly meeting of  Network
	Interaction & dialogues in community level, ward level and municipality level organized by YEGs & Networks


3) Families and victims of unsafe migration & potential migrants enjoy better livelihood options.


	Coordination and linkage with different stakeholders for need identification, rapport building and market management
	Entrepreneurship & business planning training
	Vocational training for 4 selected demands per ward
	Registration support for the entrepreneurs
	Initial materials support for business stater
	Coordination and linkage for vocational training and local resource mobilization with local government
	Awareness events in ward level by YEGs

en.full: Promoting safe migration and preventing human trafficking in Nepal.(2018-19)

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
